meta.homeDescription: Browse real Thailand condominium projects and verified public sale and rent listings across Bangkok, Pattaya, Phuket, Chiang Mai, Rayong, and Hua Hin.
meta.propertiesDescription: Filter verified Thailand property listings by city, district, developer, transit, price, and bedrooms.
meta.searchDescription: Search placeholder Thailand property listings by keyword, location, and property type.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn about GoThailandHome, a Thailand property platform for international buyers, sellers, and renters.
meta.contactDescription: Contact GoThailandHome for property enquiries. Placeholder contact details for MVP.
meta.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for could not be found.
meta.citiesDescription: Explore Thailand property by city: Bangkok, Pattaya, Phuket, Chiang Mai, Rayong, and Hua Hin.
meta.developersDescription: Developer profiles, official websites, and published projects on GoThailandHome.
meta.findMyHomeDescription: Submit a private buyer or tenant brief. Your demand is never published publicly.
meta.listYourPropertyDescription: Submit an owner listing for platform review. Nothing is auto-published.
meta.developerPartnerDescription: Apply for a developer partnership. Applications stay pending until review.
meta.agencyPartnerDescription: Apply for an agency partnership. Applications stay pending until review.

projectLanding.listingsNote: Prices are copied from public listing pages. Source link and update/capture date are shown for each record.
projectLanding.leadSubtitle: Ask about sale or rental units at this project. UTM and click IDs are captured for future ads attribution.
projectLanding.success: Enquiry received. We will follow up soon.
projectLanding.adsNote: Conversion tracking placeholders are ready for Meta Pixel and Google Ads IDs.

home.headline: Thailand property, city by city
home.subheadline: Search verified public listings and real condominium projects across major Thailand markets.
home.destinationsSubtitle: Browse placeholder routes for major Thailand markets.
home.whyBody: English, Chinese, and Thai browsing with a simple property journey from discovery to enquiry.
home.featuredProjectsSubtitle: Published projects imported from official and public sources.
home.latestListingsSubtitle: Sale and rent units with source URL and update/capture dates.
home.citiesSubtitle: Start with a Thailand city market.
home.developersSubtitle: Company profiles linked to published projects.
home.investmentBody: Browse sale inventory sorted from lowest price for entry screening.
home.ctaBody: Send an enquiry about a city, project, or listing. No public login required.

properties.title: Property listings
properties.subtitle: Verified public listings with filters for sale, rent, city, district, developer, transit, price, and bedrooms.

property.notFound: This property could not be found.

search.title: Search properties
search.subtitle: Filter placeholder listings by keyword, location, and type.

about.title: About GoThailandHome
about.subtitle: A Thailand property platform for Chinese and international audiences.
about.body1: GoThailandHome is being built as a practical destination for discovering homes across Thailand. This MVP uses placeholder listings and copy only.
about.body2: Future phases may add richer listing data, enquiry workflows, and market guides. There is no CMS, database, map, or AI integration in this release.
about.missionBody: Make Thailand property discovery clearer for English, Chinese, and Thai users.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach Platform Customer Success for help and escalation. Listing contacts appear on each property page when available.
contact.name: Name
contact.note: Platform support is separate from listing ownership. Apple is Platform Customer Success only.

footer.tagline: Thailand property for buyers, sellers, and renters.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page may have moved, or the link is incorrect.

cities.title: Cities
cities.subtitle: Thailand property markets with district and project hubs.
cities.emptyProjects: No imported projects in this area yet.

developers.title: Developers
developers.subtitle: Published developer profiles with projects and listings.

marketplace.findSubtitle: Tell us what you need. Your request stays private — it is never published as a public listing.
marketplace.findPrivacyNote: Private demand lead only. We will not publish your requirements publicly.
marketplace.listSubtitle: Submit your property for platform review. Nothing is auto-published.
marketplace.listReviewNote: All owner submissions enter pending review. Listings are not auto-published.
marketplace.developerPartnerSubtitle: Apply to collaborate with GoThailandHome. Applications stay pending until platform review.
marketplace.agencyPartnerSubtitle: Apply as a licensed agency partner. Applications stay pending until platform review.
marketplace.partnerPendingNote: Applications remain pending until the GoThailandHome team reviews them.
marketplace.supportFormNote: This form reaches Platform Customer Success for help and escalation. It does not register Apple or platform staff as a listing owner.
marketplace.name: Name
marketplace.consent: I consent to GoThailandHome contacting me about this private request.
marketplace.authorization: I confirm I am the owner or an authorized agent for this property.
marketplace.successPrivate: Thank you. Your private Find My Home request was received and will not be published.
marketplace.successReview: Thank you. Your listing submission is pending platform review and will not auto-publish.
marketplace.successPending: Thank you. Your partnership application is pending platform review.
marketplace.successSupport: Thank you. Platform Customer Success received your message.
marketplace.successViewing: Thank you. Your viewing request was received.
marketplace.listingContactMissing: No listing contact is on file for this property. Platform Customer Success can help escalate — they are not the listing owner.
marketplace.platformSupportNote: Separate from the listing contact. Apple and platform staff never replace the listing owner or agent.
